isolation.baseline: Started in isolated session; cleared cookies/localStorage before tests; built profile/dashboard state in-session via Create flow

assertions.title: Enter Rotate Package renders with package input, QR button, password, Apply button, back to settings

steps.action: Navigate from Dashboard Settings -> Rotate Share
steps.observed: Opened http://127.0.0.1:5173/rotate-share with Back to Settings link, Rotate Package input, Scan QR button, Package Password field, and disabled Apply Share Update button until valid package

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Applying Share Update renders with vertical step timeline showing progress

steps.action: Enter valid package (bfonboard1...) and password, click Apply Share Update
steps.expected: Navigate to Applying Share Update with mixed done/active/pending timeline states
steps.observed: Opened http://127.0.0.1:5173/rotate-share/applying with vertical timeline (first steps done, local share update active, profile saving pending), package summary bar, and Cancel Share Update button

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Share Update Failed renders with amber warning and retry/back buttons

steps.action: From Applying Share Update click Simulate Failure
steps.expected: Navigate to Share Update Failed with amber warning and recovery actions
steps.observed: Opened http://127.0.0.1:5173/rotate-share/failed showing amber warning callout ('Rotate package did not apply'), Retry, and Back to Rotate Share actions

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Local Share Updated renders with green success banner and identity changes card (old/new values)

steps.action: Run successful apply path and wait for completion
steps.expected: Navigate to Local Share Updated with success banner and old/new identity rows
steps.observed: Opened http://127.0.0.1:5173/rotate-share/updated with green success banner and Identity Changes card showing Group Public Key unchanged plus Share Public Key and Profile ID old/new comparisons

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Full Rotate Share happy path navigable (Settings -> Enter -> Applying -> Updated -> Dashboard)

steps.observed: Settings opened on dashboard route and showed Rotate Share button

steps.action: Navigate Settings -> Enter Rotate Package -> Applying Share Update -> Local Share Updated

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Rotate Share failure path navigable (Enter -> Applying -> Failed -> retry/back)

steps.action: Enter valid package and apply, then trigger Simulate Failure

steps.expected: Re-attempt update by returning to applying

steps.action: Click Back to Rotate Share on failed screen

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Header (Igloo branding) and footer (icon links) present on all screens

steps.action: Capture full-page screenshots on required representative screens
steps.expected: Header branding and footer icon-links visible across screen areas
steps.observed: Verified on Welcome (/), Dashboard (/dashboard/{profileId}), Create Keyset (/create), Import Load Backup (/import), Onboard Enter Package (/onboard), Recover Collect Shares (/recover/{profileId}), and Rotate Keyset form (/rotate-keyset)

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

assertions.title: Back navigation links work correctly across all flow screens

steps.action: Back-link checks on representative flow screens
steps.expected: Back actions return to documented parent routes
steps.observed: Import /import -> /, Onboard /onboard -> /, Rotate Keyset /rotate-keyset -> /, Rotate Share /rotate-share -> /dashboard/{profileId} when entered from dashboard settings

steps.action: Guard redirect checks on deep links without required state
steps.observed: Direct /rotate-share/applying redirected to /rotate-share; direct /rotate-share/updated redirected to /rotate-share; direct /create/profile redirected to /create

evidence.network: No requests captured by agent-browser network logger (requests --json: [])

frictions.description: Applying Share Update auto-advances quickly; failure path can be missed unless Simulate Failure is clicked immediately after entering /rotate-share/applying.
frictions.resolution: Triggered failure via immediate click on Simulate Failure after route transition.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned empty arrays for these SPA route transitions.
frictions.resolution: Used URL transitions, route observations, screenshots, and explicit network logger output ([]) as evidence.

summary: Tested 8 assertions for rotate-share-cross: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Rotate Share happy/failure paths and cross-area header/footer + back/guard behaviors validated with screenshot evidence.
